sections.title: Background and Rationale
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Summarize disease context, preliminary efficacy and safety signals, and the rationale for a phase 2 single-arm design.

sections.title: Objectives
sections.llm_prompt_hint: State primary, secondary, and exploratory objectives appropriate for a signal-seeking phase 2 study.

sections.title: Study Design
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Describe the phase 2 single-arm design, enrollment schema, treatment regimen, treatment cycles, and follow-up plan.

sections.title: Eligibility Criteria
sections.llm_prompt_hint: List inclusion and exclusion criteria with disease definition, prior therapy, organ function, and safety constraints.

sections.title: Study Procedures
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Outline screening, treatment administration, response assessments, safety monitoring, dose modifications, and long-term follow-up.

sections.title: Outcome Measures
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Define the primary efficacy endpoint, key secondary endpoints, safety endpoints, and exact assessment rules.

sections.title: Statistical Analysis Plan
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Specify hypothesis thresholds, analysis populations, confidence intervals, sample size assumptions, futility logic, and missing data handling.

sections.title: Ethical Considerations
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Cover consent, risk-benefit balance, toxicity management, reproductive precautions, confidentiality, and oversight.

sections.title: Data Management
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Describe CRF/EDC workflow, monitoring, source documentation, edit checks, and retention requirements.

sections.title: References
sections.llm_prompt_hint: Compile cited literature, response criteria, CTCAE references, and methodology standards.

sections.title: Simon Two-Stage Design Parameters
sections.llm_prompt_hint: State null and alternative response rates, alpha, power, stage 1 enrollment, futility boundary, and total sample size.
